summary: FAIL — milestone-1 STATE.json=FAILED, failed_wave=D, Wave T skipped. Three CRITICAL findings (build state, Wave T skipped, Playwright entirely missing) force FAIL regardless of dedupe arithmetic. Comprehensive rubric scored 791 in isolation, downgraded to 612 composite to reflect cross-auditor severity escalations on STACK-IMPORT-002 (HIGH not MEDIUM after technical+mcp-library merge), NestJS+React version mismatches, missing typecheck/lint scripts, and audit-fix-loop never iterated (convergence_cycles=0). Forbidden TypeORM surface clean. STACK-IMPORT-002 root cause: apps/api/src/database/prisma.service.ts:12 require('@prisma/client') instead of static import — closes via type-only import per audit-mcp-library guidance.

ac_results.evidence: F-007 typecheck script missing; F-008 web lint script missing; F-009 api lint is tsc --noEmit; F-010 NestJS 11 vs 10; F-011 React 19 vs 18; F-021 prettier absent
schema/compose/.env.example present; F-015 duplicate schema; F-020 WEB_PORT hardcoded; F-025 stub migration; F-026 JWT_SECRET fallback drift; F-027 empty seed without guard
ValidationPipe + envelope + error filter + pagination present; F-013 openapi.json path mismatch; F-017 helmet not wired; F-019 normalization middleware masks drift
i18n + RTL + tokens + AppShell + Icon present; F-014 locale path mismatch; F-023 id locale scope creep; F-024 --color-background unapplied
F-005 auth bearer interceptor missing; F-006 toast helper missing; F-018 default api-client has no baseUrl
Jest + Vitest configs present and green; F-002 Wave T skipped; F-003 Playwright entirely missing; F-012 layout.tsx render spec missing; F-022 CI scripts incomplete
layout sets lang/dir; F-014 messages/ vs locales/<locale>/common.json
apps/web/src/styles/tokens.css:6 design tokens present and consumed
SDK present; F-005 + F-006 + F-018 — no auth interceptor, no toast, default client lacks baseUrl

findings.summary: Milestone-1 STATE.json=FAILED with failed_wave=D and wave_fail_recovery_attempt
findings.evidence: .agent-team/STATE.json:29 status=FAILED; failure_reason=wave_fail_recovery_attempt; failed_wave=D
findings.remediation: Re-run audit-fix; resolve Wave D compile errors; investigate recovery_wave_redispatch_enabled=false and reaudit_trigger_fix_enabled non-trigger.

findings.summary: Wave T skipped — zero E2E execution against milestone-1 build
findings.evidence: WAVE_FINDINGS.json wave_t_status=skipped; skip_reason='Wave D failed'; .agent-team/telemetry/milestone-1-wave-D.json compile_passed=false after 3 iterations
findings.remediation: Fix Wave D compile then re-run Wave T (Playwright smoke).

findings.summary: Playwright base config and smoke spec entirely missing — REQ-PLT-006 unmet
findings.evidence: no playwright.config.{ts,js,mjs} anywhere; @playwright/test absent from all package.json; no e2e/ dir; no test:e2e script
findings.remediation: Add @playwright/test devDep; scaffold playwright.config.ts; write e2e/smoke.spec.ts opening locale-prefixed home page; wire pnpm test:e2e in root package.json.

findings.summary: STACK-IMPORT-002 — @prisma/client loaded via require() not static import; defeats stack-contract scanner and masks generator absence
findings.evidence: apps/api/src/database/prisma.service.ts:12 dynamic require inside loadPrismaClient(); WAVE_FINDINGS.json STACK-IMPORT-002
findings.remediation: Replace require('@prisma/client') with `import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'` at module top; have PrismaService extend PrismaClient. For test env, run `prisma generate` in CI or jest.mock at spec level. Drop SKIP_PRISMA_CONNECT containment switch. Type-only `import type { PrismaClient }` is sufficient to close the scanner finding without runtime change (audit-mcp-library:LIB-PRISMA-IMPORT-PATTERN-EVADES-VALIDATOR).

findings.summary: Auth bearer-token interceptor / fetcher hook missing from api-client wiring — REQ-PLT-005 / WIRE-PLT-004
findings.evidence: apps/web/src/lib/api-client.ts:1-27 — only baseUrl + credentials:include; no token plumbing
findings.remediation: Add request middleware on the cached @hey-api/client-fetch instance that reads JWT from cookie/localStorage and injects Authorization: Bearer <token>.

findings.summary: Translated runtime-error toast helper missing — REQ-PLT-005 / WIRE-PLT-004
findings.evidence: grep toast|Toast|notify across apps/web/src returns no matches
findings.remediation: Add apps/web/src/lib/toast.ts (or ToastProvider) wired through next-intl getTranslations.

findings.summary: Root pnpm typecheck script missing — NFR 'pnpm typecheck clean' unfulfillable
findings.evidence: package.json has no typecheck script; pnpm typecheck → ERR_PNPM_RECURSIVE_EXEC_FIRST_FAIL
findings.remediation: Add root typecheck script delegating to per-workspace tsc --noEmit; add typecheck script to apps/api + apps/web.

findings.summary: apps/web has no lint script — pnpm lint silently skips web via --if-present
findings.evidence: apps/web/package.json:5-10 has no lint script; apps/web/eslint.config.js exists but never invoked
findings.remediation: Add lint: 'eslint .' to apps/web/package.json; root pnpm lint will then invoke web ESLint config (incl. CSS-logical-properties rule).

findings.summary: apps/api lint script is `tsc --noEmit`, not ESLint — REQ-PLT-001 stack lists ESLint+Prettier
findings.evidence: apps/api/package.json:10 lint=tsc --noEmit; no api eslint config
findings.remediation: Install eslint + @typescript-eslint, add eslint.config.js for api, set lint script to `eslint .`; rename current tsc --noEmit to `typecheck`.

findings.summary: NestJS 11 used — REQ-PLT-001 + STACK_CONTRACT pin NestJS 10
findings.evidence: apps/api/package.json:18-39 all @nestjs/* at ^11.0.0; REQUIREMENTS.md:11 specifies NestJS 10
findings.remediation: Either downgrade @nestjs/* to ^10.x to match contract, or amend REQUIREMENTS.md + STACK_CONTRACT.json to ratify Nest 11 (Node 20 LTS, Express 5 implications).

findings.summary: React 19 used — REQUIREMENTS.md mandates React 18
findings.evidence: apps/web/package.json react+react-dom ^19.0.0; REQUIREMENTS.md:12 says React 18
findings.remediation: Downgrade react + react-dom to ^18.3 (and @types/react/-dom) or amend REQUIREMENTS.md.

findings.summary: No render spec for app/[locale]/layout.tsx — REQ-PLT-006 (existing AppShell.spec.tsx covers sibling)
findings.evidence: AppShell.spec.tsx tests AppShell, not the locale layout; layout.tsx has zero coverage
findings.remediation: Add apps/web/src/app/[locale]/__tests__/layout.spec.tsx asserting <html lang=ar dir=rtl> and lang=en dir=ltr.

findings.summary: openapi.json emission path mismatch — REQ-PLT-003 says openapi.json; spec emitted to contracts/openapi/current.json
findings.evidence: scripts/generate-openapi.ts:80 OUTPUT_DIR/current.json + OUTPUT_DIR/<milestone>.json; no openapi.json in repo
findings.remediation: Either also writeFileSync(join(projectRoot,'openapi.json'),serialized) or amend REQ-PLT-003 to ratify contracts/openapi/ output.

findings.summary: Locale skeleton path mismatch — REQ-PLT-004 mandates locales/<locale>/common.json; ships at apps/web/messages/<locale>.json
findings.evidence: files at apps/web/messages/{en,ar,id}.json; locales/ dir does not exist
findings.remediation: Either move to locales/<locale>/common.json + update i18n/request.ts:11, or amend REQ-PLT-004 to ratify next-intl messages/ convention.

findings.summary: Duplicate prisma schema files (root + apps/api/prisma) — root copy is dead
findings.evidence: prisma/schema.prisma:16 + apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma:8; api scripts run from apps/api
findings.remediation: Delete root prisma/ directory; document apps/api/prisma as canonical.

findings.summary: Empty stub modules (auth/users/projects/tasks/comments) created but never imported — violates M1 'Out of Scope'
findings.evidence: five identical empty @Module classes; none imported by app.module.ts
findings.remediation: Delete the five empty modules; M2/M4/M5/M6 will create them with real content.

findings.summary: helmet declared as dependency but never registered as middleware
findings.evidence: apps/api/package.json:29 declares helmet ^8.0.0; main.ts has no app.use(helmet()) call
findings.remediation: Either add `import helmet from 'helmet'; app.use(helmet());` in bootstrap() or remove helmet from dependencies.

findings.summary: Generated api-client default client constructed without baseUrl — silent same-origin fallback
findings.evidence: packages/api-client/client.gen.ts:16 createClient(createConfig<ClientOptions>()) with no override; ClientOptions baseUrl required but unset
findings.remediation: Move getApiClient() into the api-client package as a CreateClientConfig wired to NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL.

findings.summary: RequestNormalizationMiddleware silently rewrites snake_case → camelCase before ValidationPipe — masks contract drift
findings.evidence: apps/api/src/common/middleware/request-normalization.middleware.ts:41 mutates request.query+request.body pre-validation
findings.remediation: Remove middleware registration in app.module.ts:28 and delete request-normalization files; let forbidNonWhitelisted reject mismatched casing.

findings.summary: WEB_PORT documented in .env.example but apps/web hardcodes port 3000
findings.evidence: apps/web/package.json:6-9 hardcodes -p 3000; .env.example:5 documents WEB_PORT=3000 but unused
findings.remediation: Change scripts to next dev -p ${WEB_PORT:-3000} and next start -p ${WEB_PORT:-3000}.

findings.summary: Prettier listed in stack but absent from repo (no .prettierrc, no devDep, no format script)
findings.evidence: grep prettier returns only transitives in pnpm-lock.yaml
findings.remediation: Add prettier devDep at root; commit .prettierrc; wire format + format:check scripts.

findings.summary: Root CI scripts incomplete — no test:e2e, test:integration, typecheck, format
findings.evidence: package.json:8 root test covers Jest+Vitest only
findings.remediation: Add test:e2e, test:integration, typecheck, format scripts to root package.json so M2-M6 can co-locate.

findings.summary: Indonesian locale 'id' added beyond REQ-PLT-004 scope ({en, ar} only)
findings.evidence: apps/web/src/i18n/routing.ts:4 ['en','ar','id']
findings.remediation: Drop 'id' from routing.locales, delete messages/id.json, remove id assertion from routing.spec.ts and language.id keys; OR amend REQ-PLT-004.

findings.summary: --color-background design token defined but never applied
findings.evidence: apps/web/src/styles/tokens.css:9 defines token; AppShell.tsx:30 uses var(--color-surface)
findings.remediation: Apply --color-background to html/body, document as reserved, or reconcile PRD if hex was a typo.

findings.summary: Empty initial migration ships before M2 owns first model — REQ-PLT-002 says no entity models in M1
findings.evidence: empty stub migration shipped; prisma/schema.prisma:10
findings.remediation: Delete apps/api/prisma/migrations/20260101000000_init/ and skip prisma migrate deploy in M1.

findings.summary: Hardcoded JWT_SECRET fallback in docker-compose.yml diverges from .env.example default
findings.evidence: docker-compose.yml:39 JWT_SECRET:-dev-secret-change-me; .env.example:9 dev-insecure-change-me-please
findings.remediation: Drop the :-dev-secret-change-me fallback in compose; require JWT_SECRET passed by runner.

findings.summary: prisma/seed.ts is empty no-op without comment or production guard
findings.evidence: apps/api/prisma/seed.ts:1-5 bare empty main()
findings.remediation: Add header banner explaining deferred seed contract; add NODE_ENV=production guard.

findings.summary: STATE.json convergence_cycles=0 + audit_fix_rounds=0 — audit-fix loop never iterated
findings.evidence: STATE.json:23 convergence_cycles=0, audit_fix_rounds=0; milestone went FAILED without retry
findings.remediation: Investigate why recovery_wave_redispatch_enabled=false prevented Wave D retry; verify reaudit_trigger_fix_enabled=true cascade gates.
